title: Smoked Tofu Skewers with Croatian Influence
description: A vegetarian twist on traditional skewers, featuring smoky tofu, crispy onions, and a hint of Croatian spice.
instructions: 2. Cut tofu into 1-inch cubes and thread onto skewers.
3. In a small bowl, mix together paprika, garlic, and smoked salt (if using).
4. Brush skewers with olive oil and sprinkle with paprika mixture.
5. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until tofu is golden brown.
6. Meanwhile, heat a small pan over medium heat and add crispy onions.
7. Stir occasionally until onions are crispy and golden brown.
8. Serve skewers with crispy onions and enjoy!
